rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, did it anyway, that's a full win. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday, change room choice made — round goes to Matt. But the Apollo ring and necklace? Stayed home when work was the setting — pool nerves, ring size, 'reads too gay' — Joy Police took that one clean. Poncho still on at Balmoral both weeks, which means the brave choice keeps happening just out of eyeshot.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers and loud the second his actual life — work, his people, being seen as specifically gay — is on the line.
